_note: Curated reference of physically-backed, allocated ETCs for compliant commodity exposure. Zero charts CFD/spot (XPD/USD etc.) which are NOT investable (leverage + overnight interest). TER / broker / ISA values are best-effort — VERIFY on each broker's instrument search before relying. Maintained by hand; small, slow-moving universe.

palladium.label: Palladium
palladium.compliance_note: Palladium is not ribawi (only gold & silver are). Spot/physically-backed ownership is permissible. Own it via a physically-backed allocated ETC — avoid CFDs/futures, leverage, margin and securities-lending. Subject to your own scholarly guidance (the ETC is legally a debt security, fully collateralised by allocated metal).

platinum.label: Platinum
platinum.compliance_note: Platinum is not ribawi. Spot/physically-backed ownership is permissible via an allocated ETC — avoid CFDs/futures, leverage and margin. Subject to your own scholarly guidance.

gold.label: Gold
gold.compliance_note: Gold is ribawi — trade spot, fully allocated, with immediate possession. Use a physically-backed, allocated gold ETC only. Avoid CFDs, spread bets, futures, and ETFs holding gold futures (e.g. DBP/DGL) or any unallocated 'paper gold'.

silver.label: Silver
silver.compliance_note: Silver is ribawi — trade spot, fully allocated, with immediate possession. Use a physically-backed, allocated silver ETC only. Avoid CFDs, futures, and unallocated 'paper silver'.

usoil.label: Crude Oil (WTI)
usoil.no_vehicle_note: Crude oil can't be owned spot or physically by a retail investor — barrels aren't deliverable to you. Every retail vehicle (USO, CRUD, oil CFDs) holds rolling futures with financing/leverage, so it is both non-physical and non-Sharia-compliant (riba + gharar). There is no compliant way for you to hold crude oil. Chart & levels are reference/educational only.

wheat.label: Wheat
wheat.no_vehicle_note: Agricultural commodities have no physically-backed retail vehicle — the ETCs/ETFs hold rolling futures (financing + leverage), which are non-physical and non-Sharia-compliant. No compliant way to hold it; chart & levels are reference only.

corn.label: Corn
corn.no_vehicle_note: Agricultural commodities have no physically-backed retail vehicle — the ETCs/ETFs hold rolling futures (financing + leverage), which are non-physical and non-Sharia-compliant. No compliant way to hold it; chart & levels are reference only.

copper.label: Copper
copper.no_vehicle_note: Base-metal exposure for retail is via futures-based ETCs (financing + leverage), not allocated physical bars — non-physical and non-Sharia-compliant. No compliant retail vehicle; chart & levels are reference only.
